title: DLSA Begusarai Para Legal Volunteer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
org: District Legal Services Authority, Begusarai (DLSA Begusarai)
shortInfo: District Legal Services Authority, Begusarai (DLSA Begusarai) Recruitment 2026: District Legal Services Authority, Begusarai has released the official notification for Para Legal Volunteer posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

basic_details.job_title: DLSA Begusarai Para Legal Volunteer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: District Legal Services Authority, Begusarai (DLSA Begusarai)
basic_details.short_information: District Legal Services Authority, Begusarai (DLSA Begusarai) Recruitment 2026: District Legal Services Authority, Begusarai has released the official notification for Para Legal Volunteer posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 750/- per day (only on assigned special days)
salary_details.details: Rs. 750/- per day (only on assigned special days).

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DLSA Begusarai Para Legal Volunteer Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://begusarai.dcourts.gov.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DLSA Begusarai Para Legal Volunteer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the DLSA Begusarai Para Legal Volunteer position is 10 June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Para Legal Volunteer post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed Matriculation and possess computer knowledge to be eligible for the Para Legal Volunteer position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Para Legal Volunteer role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive Rs. 750/- per day, applicable only on assigned special days.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the DLSA Begusarai Para Legal Volunteer position?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the specified address before the last date.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Para Legal Volunteer in the District Legal Services Authority, Begusarai.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Para Legal Volunteer post?
faq.answer: The selection of candidates for the Para Legal Volunteer post will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the job location for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job location is Begusarai, Bihar.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for the Para Legal Volunteer position?
faq.answer: The job is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. When is the interview date for the shortlisted candidates?
faq.answer: The interview for the shortlisted candidates is scheduled to be held on 30 June 2026.
